title: Build MAP Research System (docs, templates, folder scaffold)
description: Per Guidelines/MAP_repo_systems_gap_review.md priority #1: MAP has no formal Research System. Build MAP_System/RESEARCH_SYSTEM.md defining the research flow (Research Question -> Research Brief -> Source Map -> Claim Evidence Matrix -> Assumption Register -> Research Summary -> Decision/HPOM Task), plus MAP_System/research/README.md and templates under MAP_System/templates/research/ (RESEARCH_BRIEF_TEMPLATE.md, SOURCE_MAP_TEMPLATE.md, SOURCE_EVALUATION_TEMPLATE.md, CLAIM_EVIDENCE_MATRIX_TEMPLATE.md, ASSUMPTION_REGISTER_TEMPLATE.md, RESEARCH_SUMMARY_TEMPLATE.md). Must define relationship to Emergence, HPOM, Memory, Context systems per the gap review's recommended flow. Track process via events.jsonl and a STATE_SNAPSHOT/handoff at session end. codex-lab-dino is taking tooling/validator/index work as a separate follow-on task; do not duplicate that scope here.
acceptance_criteria: MAP_System/RESEARCH_SYSTEM.md exists and defines research question format, source map, source quality ratings, claim extraction rules, claim evidence matrix, assumption register, contradiction handling, date-sensitivity rules, research summary format, and research-to-decision workflow
MAP_System/research/README.md exists explaining folder layout and CLI/process usage
All 6 templates listed in the gap review exist under MAP_System/templates/research/
shared/decisions.md gets a new DECISION entry recording the Research System adoption
events/events.jsonl has PROGRESS/SUBMISSION entries tracing the build
